since_last: 33% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -1.07% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 33% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.72%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -6.72%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +5.25%, SYNA +4.51%, EQIX +2.85%, PUBM +2.43%, SAP +1.58%. Laggards: MU -6.72%, MRVL -5.51%, VRT -5.30%, ARM -5.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.84% at $150.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.84% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
